controls.control_description: These instructions shall mutatis-mutandis apply to subsidiaries of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mutatis-mutandis apply to subsidiaries of the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the minimum, adhere to the following instructions in regarding to audit, review, and reporting of investment transactions: (1) an aifi shall unde
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall, at the minimum, adhere to the following instructions in regarding
to audit, review, and reporting of investment transactions:
(1) An AIFI shall undertake a half-yearly review of its investment portfolio as
on March 31 and September 30, and place the same before its Board
within two months by end-May and end-November.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the minimum, adhere to the following instructions in regarding to audit, review, and reporting of investment transactions: (1) an aifi shall unde

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover, at the minimum, operational aspects of investment portfolio, amendments made to the investment policy, major irregularities observed in all aud
controls.control_description:
The review shall
cover, at the minimum, operational aspects of investment portfolio,
amendments made to the Investment Policy, major irregularities
observed in all audit reports, compliance position thereto and certify
adherence to laid down internal Investment Policy and procedures and
Reserve Bank guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to cover, at the minimum, operational aspects of investment portfolio, amendments made to the investment policy, major irregularities observed in all aud

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a half-yearly review (as of june 30th and december 31st) of its investment portfolio and place the same before the board within two months
controls.control_description:
Explanation: National Housing Bank shall undertake a half-yearly review
(as of June 30th and December 31st) of its investment portfolio and place
the same before the Board within two months, i.e., by end-September and
end-February.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a half-yearly review (as of june 30th and december 31st) of its investment portfolio and place the same before the board within two months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the concerned office of department of supervision (dos) by june 15 and december 15 (october 15 and march 15 for national housing bank)
controls.control_description:
(2) A copy of the review report put up to the AIFI's Board, shall be forwarded
to the concerned office of Department of Supervision (DoS) by June 15
and December 15 (October 15 and March 15 for National Housing Bank),
every year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the concerned office of department of supervision (dos) by june 15 and december 15 (october 15 and march 15 for national housing bank)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be separately subjected to concurrent audit by internal auditors and the results of their audit shall be placed before the chairman / managing directo
controls.control_description:
(3) Treasury transactions shall be separately subjected to concurrent audit
by internal auditors and the results of their audit shall be placed before
the Chairman / Managing Director (MD) of the AIFI once every month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be separately subjected to concurrent audit by internal auditors and the results of their audit shall be placed before the chairman / managing directo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be audited by the same concurrent auditors who audit the treasury operations of the aifi, and the audit report shall be included in their monthly repo
controls.control_description:
(4) The business done through brokers shall be audited by the same
concurrent auditors who audit the treasury operations of the AIFI, and the
audit report shall be included in their monthly report to the Chairman / MD
of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be audited by the same concurrent auditors who audit the treasury operations of the aifi, and the audit report shall be included in their monthly repo

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the transactions in securities on an ongoing basis, monitor compliance with the laid down management policies / prescribed procedures and report
controls.control_description:
(5) The internal audit shall cover the transactions in securities on an ongoing
basis, monitor compliance with the laid down management policies /
prescribed procedures and report deficiencies directly to the
management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to cover the transactions in securities on an ongoing basis, monitor compliance with the laid down management policies / prescribed procedures and report

controls.control_objective: To ensure recognize income on accrual basis for the following: (1) securities of corporate bodies / public sector undertakings in respect of which the payment of interest and repayment of principal have been guaranteed by the central government or a state government
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall recognize income on accrual basis for the following:
(1) securities of corporate bodies / public sector undertakings in respect of
which the payment of interest and repayment of principal have been
guaranteed by the Central Government or a State Government, provided
interest is serviced regularly and as such is not in arrears.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recognize income on accrual basis for the following: (1) securities of corporate bodies / public sector undertakings in respect of which the payment of interest and repayment of principal have been guaranteed by the central government or a state government

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on cash basis
controls.control_description: Income from units of mutual funds shall be recognised on cash basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure capitalise the broken period interest paid to the seller as part of cost and treat it as an item of expenditure under profit & loss account in respect
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall not capitalise the broken period interest paid to the seller as part
of cost and treat it as an item of expenditure under Profit & Loss Account in
respect of investments in government securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to capitalise the broken period interest paid to the seller as part of cost and treat it as an item of expenditure under profit & loss account in respect

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the requirements of income tax authorities as prescribed
controls.control_description:
Explanation: This accounting treatment does not take into account the tax
implications and the AIFI shall comply with the requirements of Income Tax
Authorities as prescribed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the requirements of income tax authorities as prescribed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited to the profit & loss account and an equivalent amount (net of taxes
controls.control_description:
In the event, provisions created on account of depreciation in the 'AFS' or 'HFT'
categories are found to be in excess of the required amount in any year, the
excess shall be credited to the Profit & Loss Account and an equivalent amount
(net of taxes, if any and net of transfer to Statutory Reserves as applicable to
such excess provision) shall be appropriated to an IRA Account in Schedule -
'Reserves & Surplus' under the head 'Other Reserves'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited to the profit & loss account and an equivalent amount (net of taxes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for inclusion under tier 2 within the overall ceiling of 1
controls.control_description:
IRA shall be eligible for inclusion under Tier 2 within the overall ceiling of 1.25
per cent of total Risk Weighted Assets prescribed for General Provisions / Loss
Reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for inclusion under tier 2 within the overall ceiling of 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available to the aifi for payment of dividend
controls.control_description:
The amount drawn down from the IRA shall not be available to the AIFI for
payment of dividend.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available to the aifi for payment of dividend

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to utilise ira as follows: (1) the provisions required to be created on account of depreciation in the afs and hft categories shall be debited to the profit & loss account and an equivalent amount (net of tax benefit
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall have the freedom to utilise IRA as follows:
(1) The provisions required to be created on account of depreciation in the
AFS and HFT categories shall be debited to the Profit & Loss Account
and an equivalent amount (net of tax benefit, if any, and net of
consequent reduction in the transfer to Statutory Reserve), shall be
transferred from the IRA to the Profit & Loss Account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the freedom to utilise ira as follows: (1) the provisions required to be created on account of depreciation in the afs and hft categories shall be debited to the profit & loss account and an equivalent amount (net of tax benefit

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to draw down from the ira to the extent of provision made during the year towards depreciation in investment in afs and hft categories (net of taxes
controls.control_description:
Illustratively, an AIFI shall have the option to draw down from the IRA to
the extent of provision made during the year towards depreciation in
investment in AFS and HFT categories (net of taxes, if any, and net of
transfer to Statutory Reserves as applicable to such excess provision).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to draw down from the ira to the extent of provision made during the year towards depreciation in investment in afs and hft categories (net of taxes

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriate 25 per cent of the net profits to statutory reserves, can draw down ₹52.50 from the ira
controls.control_description:
In
other words, an AIFI which pays a tax of 30 per cent and should
appropriate 25 per cent of the net profits to Statutory Reserves, can draw
down ₹52.50 from the IRA, if the provision made for depreciation in
investments included in the AFS and HFT categories is ₹100.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriate 25 per cent of the net profits to statutory reserves, can draw down ₹52.50 from the ira

controls.control_objective: To ensure be debited under the head 'other income'
controls.control_description:
(2) The amounts debited to the Profit & Loss Account for provision shall be
debited under the head 'Other Income'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be debited under the head 'other income'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as 'below the line' item in the profit and loss appropriation account, after determining the profit for the year
controls.control_description:
(3) The amount transferred from the IRA to the Profit & Loss Account, shall
be shown as 'below the line' item in the Profit and Loss Appropriation
Account, after determining the profit for the year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as 'below the line' item in the profit and loss appropriation account, after determining the profit for the year

controls.control_objective: To ensure appear in that account before arriving at the profit for the accounting period
controls.control_description:
(4) Provision towards any erosion in the value of an asset is an item of
charge on the Profit and Loss Account, and hence shall appear in that
account before arriving at the profit for the accounting period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appear in that account before arriving at the profit for the accounting period

controls.control_objective: To ensure make the following entries: <image> i
controls.control_description:
(5) An AIFI shall not make the following entries:
<image>
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make the following entries: <image> i

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be adoption of a wrong accounting principle but would also result in a wrong statement of the profit for the accounting period
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Adoption of the above shall not only be adoption of a wrong
accounting principle but would also result in a wrong statement of the
profit for the accounting period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be adoption of a wrong accounting principle but would also result in a wrong statement of the profit for the accounting period

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon income on the securities and shall also make appropriate provisions for the depreciation in the value of the investment in respect of securitie
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall not reckon income on the securities and shall also make
appropriate provisions for the depreciation in the value of the investment in
respect of securities included in any of the three categories of investments
where interest / principal is in arrears.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon income on the securities and shall also make appropriate provisions for the depreciation in the value of the investment in respect of securitie

controls.control_objective: To ensure set-off the depreciation requirement in respect of these non-performing securities against the appreciation in respect of other performing securities
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall not set-off the depreciation
requirement in respect of these non-performing securities against the
appreciation in respect of other performing securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set-off the depreciation requirement in respect of these non-performing securities against the appreciation in respect of other performing securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used to classify an investment as non-performing investment (npi), i
controls.control_description:
The criterion used to classify an asset as Non-Performing Asset (NPA) shall be
used to classify an investment as Non-Performing Investment (NPI), i.e., an
NPI is one where interest / instalment (including maturity proceeds) is due and
remains unpaid for more than 90 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used to classify an investment as non-performing investment (npi), i

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply, mutatis-mutandis, to preference shares where the fixed dividend is not paid
controls.control_description:
The above shall apply, mutatis-mutandis, to preference shares where the fixed
dividend is not paid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply, mutatis-mutandis, to preference shares where the fixed dividend is not paid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as due / unpaid in arrears and the date of balance sheet of the issuer for that particular year shall be reckoned as due date for the purpo
controls.control_description:
If the dividend on preference shares (cumulative or non-
cumulative) is not declared / paid in any year it shall be treated as due / unpaid
in arrears and the date of balance sheet of the issuer for that particular year
shall be reckoned as due date for the purpose of asset classification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as due / unpaid in arrears and the date of balance sheet of the issuer for that particular year shall be reckoned as due date for the purpo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as npi
controls.control_description:
In the case of equity shares, in the event the investment in the shares of any
company is valued at ₹1 per company on account of the non-availability of the
latest balance sheet in accordance with paragraph 54 of these Directions, those
equity shares shall be reckoned as NPI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as npi

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be treated as npi and vice versa
controls.control_description:
If any credit facility availed by the issuer is NPA in the books of the AIFI,
investment in any of the securities, including preference shares issued by the
same issuer shall also be treated as NPI and vice versa.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be treated as npi and vice versa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable in cases where only the preference shares are classified as npi, and in such cases, the investment in any of the other performing securi
controls.control_description:
Provided that this stipulation shall not be applicable in cases where only the
preference shares are classified as NPI, and in such cases, the investment in
any of the other performing securities issued by the same issuer need not be
classified as NPI and any performing credit facilities granted to that borrower
need not be treated as NPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable in cases where only the preference shares are classified as npi, and in such cases, the investment in any of the other performing securi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as npa ab initio in the same asset classification category as the loan
controls.control_description:
In case of conversion of principal and / or interest into equity, debentures,
bonds, etc., such instruments shall be treated as NPA ab initio in the same
asset classification category as the loan, if the loan's classification is
substandard or doubtful on implementation of the restructuring package and
provision shall be made as per the norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as npa ab initio in the same asset classification category as the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract prudential norms for identification of npi and provisioning
controls.control_description:
Government guaranteed investments:
(1) Investment in State Government guaranteed securities, shall attract
prudential norms for identification of NPI and provisioning, when interest /
instalment of principal (including maturity proceeds) or any other amount
due to the AIFI remains unpaid for more than 90 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract prudential norms for identification of npi and provisioning

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as npi until the central government has repudiated the guarantee when invoked
controls.control_description:
(2) An AIFI's investments in bonds guaranteed by Central Government shall
not be classified as NPI until the Central Government has repudiated the
guarantee when invoked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as npi until the central government has repudiated the guarantee when invoked

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available for the purpose of recognition of income
controls.control_description:
However, this exemption from classification as
NPI shall not be available for the purpose of recognition of income.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available for the purpose of recognition of income

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The instructions and guidelines already repealed shall
continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish similar statements in respect of constituents' accounts (including brokers)
controls.control_description:
Where client / constituent accounts are permitted, an AIFI shall furnish similar
statements in respect of constituents' Accounts (including Brokers).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish similar statements in respect of constituents' accounts (including brokers)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned under column 2
controls.control_description:
In the
case of constituents' accounts, the face value and book value of securities
appearing in the relevant registers of the AIFI shall be mentioned under
Column 2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned under column 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided in the footnote
controls.control_description:
Details of securities held on physical form (SGL Forms, scrips, letter of
allotment, subscription receipt etc.), if any, may be provided in the footnote.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided in the footnote
